# Diagram-Led Lesson

## Intent
Use a sequence of diagrams to teach change over stages before prose fills the gaps.

## Best For
- Processes that unfold in visible stages
- Science lessons where each stage changes the structure
- Classes that benefit from stepwise visual progression

## Not Ideal For
- Single static visuals
- Topics with no meaningful stage progression

## Learner Fit
- Visual
- General

## Subjects
- Biology
- Chemistry
- Earth science

## Lesson Flow
Hook -> Diagram series -> Explain -> Process -> Practice -> What Next

## Required Components
- SectionHeader
- HookHero
- DiagramSeries
- ExplanationBlock
- PracticeStack
- WhatNextBridge

## Optional Components
- ProcessSteps
- GlossaryRail
- PitfallAlert

## Why This Template Exists
Some ideas are best learned as a visible sequence. This template turns that sequence into the lesson backbone.

## Responsive Notes
Keep the stage sequence above the explanatory prose and keep glossary support inline on smaller screens.

## Print Notes
Print all stages in sequence and expand the process steps below them.
